compiled_state.title: record-review.sh: reviewer-findings.json hash mismatch on first commit attempt -> review must be re-run
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
During commit workflow for bug a9f2-d555, record-review.sh reported 'reviewer-findings.json hash mismatch — file was tampered with'. The reviewer sub-agent returned REVIEWER_HASH=fb317218... but record-review.sh computed Actual=5bb3068c... for the same file. Re-running the review (dispatching a fresh code-reviewer sub-agent) and re-recording produced a valid hash on the second attempt. The diff had not changed between the two review dispatches (same diff_hash 52499f73). This suggests something modified or replaced reviewer-findings.json between write-reviewer-findings.sh and record-review.sh — possibly a timing issue with the PostToolUse formatting hook or a stale findings file from a prior review pass.

comments.body: Gate 1a: intent-aligned — ARTIFACTS_DIR mismatch; reviewer sub-agent writes reviewer-findings.json to its own ARTIFACTS_DIR hash, while record-review.sh reads from orchestrator's ARTIFACTS_DIR; prior fix 04ca-4c91 (commit 3119aed9) added --findings-file flag to record-review.sh but the calling workflow (COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md and review dispatch prompt) was NOT updated to pass it. High confidence.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Investigation complete (INTERMEDIATE). ROOT_CAUSE: REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md Step 4 dispatch templates do not include WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR, so write-reviewer-findings.sh in sub-agent context hashes sub-agent's REPO_ROOT (potentially different from orchestrator's), writing reviewer-findings.json to wrong /tmp/workflow-plugin-<hash>/ directory; record-review.sh reads from orchestrator's ARTIFACTS_DIR, finding stale file or missing file. Prior fix 04ca-4c91 added --findings-file to record-review.sh but never updated the calling workflow. Fix: update REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md Step 4 dispatch templates to include WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR={ARTIFACTS_DIR} in all reviewer sub-agent prompts. Testing_mode: GREEN.
comments.author: Test
